articles.title: Xi Pressures Takaichi By Throttling Key Mineral Exports to Japan
articles.summary: China is choking shipments of some critical minerals to Japan, a slowdown that’s hurting companies and prompting calls for Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi to find a diplomatic off-ramp with Beijing.

articles.title: Huntington Bancshares Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
articles.summary: Huntington Bancshares Inc. (HBAN) shares rose 2.05% to $17.40 on a tough trading day where the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced declines. This marks the third consecutive day of gains for Huntington Bancshares, showcasing its outperformance compared to the broader market. The stock’s positive movement occurred despite a general downturn in the stock market.

AEON Biopharma (AEON) director awarded 222,684 RSUs in equity grant
articles.summary: AEON Biopharma director Jost Fischer received an equity grant of 222,684 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on June 17, 2026, at no cash cost. This award, detailed in a Form 4 filing, increases his direct holdings to 489,469 shares of Class A Common Stock. The RSUs are compensation-related and will vest fully on the earlier of one year from the grant date or the 2027 annual stockholders' meeting, provided Mr. Fischer remains in service.

articles.title: Hudson Pacific Properties COO Andrew Wattula resigns; duties reassigned By Investing.com
articles.summary: Hudson Pacific Properties (NYSE: HPP) announced the resignation of COO Andrew Wattula, who cited no financial or operational disagreements. His duties will be reassigned among existing executive officers while the company decides on filling the role. This leadership change occurs as the real estate company, despite a "weak" financial health score from InvestingPro, has seen a significant stock surge and is considered undervalued.

articles.title: Form 4 US Physical Therapy Inc For: 22 June By Investing.com
articles.summary: This article from Investing.com announces the Form 4 filing for US Physical Therapy Inc. corresponding to June 22. The article does, however, include stock performance data for various indices and commodities.

articles.title: Big Tech Apprehension Still Exists: Raymond James' De
articles.summary: An expert from Raymond James discusses the continued apprehension surrounding Big Tech, despite overall optimism in the market. The conversation highlights how new ETF launches, particularly those related to AI and space tech, are attracting new investors, while established "Magnificent 7" ETFs are seeing outflows. The discussion also covers the impact of leveraged single-stock ETFs on institutional investors and the increasing volatility in the market due to these products.

articles.title: AMETEK Inc (AME) Shares Fall 3.1% -- What GF Score of 97 Tells Investors
articles.summary: AMETEK Inc (AME) shares dropped 3.1% to $234.08, which is 16.9% above its GF Value™ of $200.30, indicating it is currently overvalued. The company boasts a strong GF Score™ of 97/100, driven by perfect scores in Profitability and Growth (10/10) and a solid Financial Strength (8/10), yet its Valuation score is lower at 6/10. Insider selling totaling $0.1 million over three months, with no buying activity, suggests caution for potential investors.

Despite a strong GF Score™ of 78/100, insider selling of $7.8 million over the last three months, without any buying, suggests caution for potential investors. articles.title: Colgate-Palmolive Co (CL) Stock Up 3.1% and Still Undervalued -- GF Score: 85/100

While its GF Value™ indicates an upside, its current P/E ratio is above its historical median, and recent insider selling activity has been noted. Investors should consider both the potential undervaluation and these cautionary signals.

articles.title: [Form 4] Salesforce, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
articles.summary: Salesforce, Inc. President and CRO Miguel Milano reported routine equity compensation activity, not open-market trades. On June 22, 2026, he exercised restricted stock units for 2,541 shares, with 1,001 shares automatically withheld at $150.12 each to cover tax liabilities. This Form 4 filing details the vesting schedule of these restricted stock units, which convert to common stock on a one-for-one basis.

articles.title: UAE Oil Exports Surge to 85% of Pre-War Levels, IEA Says
articles.summary: Oil exports from the United Arab Emirates in early June recovered to nearly 85% of the country’s pre-Iran war levels — rebounding even before Washington and Tehran inked an interim peace deal as the Gulf nation drew on pipelines, storage and alternate shipping routes, according to a report from the International Energy Agency.

articles.title: Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) awards 49,757 RSUs to its chief accounting officer
articles.summary: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE: CRM) has awarded 49,757 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) to Guy Wanger, its EVP & Chief Accounting Officer. This equity grant, converting to common shares on a one-for-one basis upon vesting, is compensation-related and not an open-market transaction. The RSUs will vest over a four-year period, with substantial portions vesting in the first and subsequent years.

articles.title: U.S. crude stockpiles fell 765K barrels last week, API says
Torii's Gartner Nod Signals a New Era: Governing AI's Rise in the Enterprise
articles.summary: Torii has been named a "Leader" in Gartner's 2026 Magic Quadrant for SaaS Management Platforms, signaling a critical industry shift towards governing AI agents and autonomous tools within enterprises. This recognition highlights the urgent need for organizations to manage "Shadow AI" to avoid escalating costs and security risks. The report emphasizes the convergence of cost, control, and compliance, making SaaS and AI management a strategic imperative rather than just an IT project.

articles.title: Alphabet Set to Join and Honeywell International to Remain in Dow Jones Industrial Average
articles.summary: Alphabet (GOOGL) Class C shares are set to be included in the Dow Jones Industrial Average, signaling a significant shift in the index's composition. Meanwhile, Honeywell International (HON) will retain its position in the Dow. This rebalancing reflects changes in the market landscape.

articles.title: Form 13G POET TECHNOLOGIES INC. For: 22 June By Investing.com

The content primarily consists of financial market data, popular news snippets, and platform navigation elements.

articles.title: TTM opens $130M defense electronics facility in Syracuse By Investing.com
articles.summary: TTM Technologies (NASDAQ:TTMI) has inaugurated a new $130 million Ultra-High-Density Interconnect printed circuit board manufacturing facility in Syracuse, New York, including a $30 million contribution from the U.S. Department of Defense. This expansion, which will create up to 400 new jobs, aims to boost domestic production of advanced circuit boards for defense applications, an area previously dominated by Asian manufacturing. The opening coincides with a nearly 490% surge in TTM's stock over the past year and recent analyst upgrades, although InvestingPro suggests the stock may be overvalued relative to its Fair Value.

articles.title: [SCHEDULE 13D] SEACOR Marine Holdings Inc. Major Shareholder Acquisition (>5%)
articles.summary: Jorey Chernett, a private investor, has filed a Schedule 13D for SEACOR Marine Holdings Inc. (SMHI), disclosing beneficial ownership of 7.19% of the company's common stock, acquired for $12.7 million. Chernett believes the stock is undervalued and has urged the board to explore strategic alternatives, including a sale of the company or asset monetization, to address the discount between the share price and the estimated net asset value of its fleet. This filing indicates an activist-style engagement aimed at influencing the company's strategic direction.

articles.title: Conagra Brands (CAG) to Join S&P 600 Index Starting June 30
articles.summary: Conagra Brands Inc. (CAG) is set to join the S&P 600 Index on June 30, replacing Grid Dynamics (GDYN), which is expected to boost its visibility and attract new investments. The company, with a market capitalization of $6.43 billion, has a GF Score of 60/100, indicating moderate long-term return potential, and its stock is currently valued with a low price-to-sales and forward P/E ratio, suggesting it might be undervalued. Recent insider buying activity further signals confidence in its future performance, though investors should consider its mixed financial strength and growth ranks.

articles.title: S&P shakeup adds Honeywell Aerospace, Toast and NHI
articles.summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices announced several index changes taking effect between June 29 and July 1, 2026. Honeywell Aerospace (HONA) will join the S&P 500 and S&P 100 after spinning off from Honeywell International. Conagra Brands (CAG), National Health Investors (NHI), Toast (TOST), and IES Holdings (IESC) will move into various S&P indices, while Apollo Commercial Real Estate Finance (ARI), Grid Dynamics (GDYN), TopBuild (BLD), and Janus Henderson (JHG) will be removed from their current indices due to liquidation activities or acquisitions.

articles.title: Form 4 Werewolf Therapeutics Inc For: 22 June By Investing.com
articles.summary: This article from Investing.com is a regulatory filing notification, specifically a Form 4 for Werewolf Therapeutics Inc (HOWL) dated June 22. Form 4 reports changes in beneficial ownership of company stock by insiders. The article contains minimal descriptive content beyond the headline and the company's stock symbol.

articles.title: MSCI reclassifies Bulgaria to frontier market status
articles.summary: MSCI has reclassified Bulgaria from Standalone to Frontier Market status, effective with the May 2027 Index Review, citing improved liquidity on its stock exchange and its transition to the euro. The index provider also raised concerns about shareholder transparency in Indonesia and Turkey, potentially leading to further reclassifications if issues are not resolved. Additionally, MSCI confirmed Greece's reclassification to Developed Market status will be implemented in May 2027 and noted ongoing issues with Korea's market accessibility.

articles.title: Asian Stocks Set to Extend AI Chip-Fueled Selloff: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: Stocks in Asia were poised to extend Tuesday’s losses after a bruising Wall Street tech-led selloff deepened concerns that the AI-driven equity rally has run too far.

articles.title: Dow swaps Verizon for Alphabet as Honeywell stays in the index
articles.summary: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) before market open on June 29, 2026, due to Verizon's lower share price giving it an immaterial impact on the price-weighted index. Honeywell International will remain in the DJIA following the spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace. This change aims to broaden the DJIA's exposure to dynamic areas of the U.S. economy, particularly in technology and digital services, with Alphabet's larger market capitalization and share price making it a more representative constituent.

articles.title: Cummins Inc (CMI) Shares Fall 3.6% -- GF Value Says Still Overva

Insiders have sold $9.8 million worth of shares in the last three months, raising concerns about its current valuation.

articles.title: Alphabet to Join Dow Jones Industrial Average, Replacing Verizon
articles.summary: Alphabet, Google's parent company and one of the world's largest by market capitalization, is set to be included in the Dow Jones Industrial Average. This change will occur before the trading session opens on June 29, with Alphabet replacing Verizon Communications.

Starmer steps down: What Andy Burnham means for crypto in the UK
articles.summary: Burnham brings a dose of optimism to the UK crypto industry, having previously supported the blockchain industry as mayor of Manchester.

articles.title: Honeywell Aerospace set to join S&P 500 and S&P 100 on June 29
articles.summary: Honeywell Aerospace Inc. (HONAV) is slated to join both the S&P 100 and S&P 500 indices on June 29 following its spinoff from Honeywell International. This inclusion led to a 9.4% surge in HONAV shares in after-hours trading, reflecting investor enthusiasm for aerospace and defense pure-play exposure. The move will see Honeywell Aerospace replace Honeywell International in the S&P 100 and Conagra Brands in the S&P 500, with Conagra moving to the S&P SmallCap 600.

articles.title: Huntington Bank building renovations to close part of Market Street
articles.summary: Renovations to the Huntington Bank building in downtown Youngstown will cause a temporary closure of a portion of Market Street on June 24. The street, specifically around 26 South Market Street, will be closed from 8 a.m. to 7 p.m. due to the need for a crane for upper-floor renovations, impacting both vehicle and pedestrian traffic.

articles.title: Catheter Precision files prospectus for 68.07M share offering
articles.summary: Catheter Precision has filed a prospectus with the SEC to offer 68.07 million common shares, aiming to raise capital for its corporate objectives. This filing provides regulatory details for the proposed securities offering. The company recently secured 11 new patents for its heart failure and vascular closure technologies, strengthening its intellectual property as it discusses the potential sale of these assets.

articles.title: Nordson Corp. stock outperforms competitors despite losses on the day
articles.summary: Shares of Nordson Corp. (NDSN) fell 1.35% to $291.07, marking a second consecutive day of losses despite the stock market's overall rough trading session. The S&P 500 Index (SPX) dropped 1.44% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) fell 0.09%. Despite its own decline, Nordson's stock performance still outpaced these broader market indices.

articles.title: Black-Market Peptides Fuel a Multibillion-Dollar Gold Rush
articles.summary: Bloomberg's Madison Muller and Amanda Mull break down a rising black-market trend in the 'wellness' space, as customers look for more shots to fix issues like sleep or weight following the success of GLP-1s. However, Muller says that the drugs carry a risk, whether it's using a non FDA tested substance or user error around the injection itself.  (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: MSCI Upgrades Bulgaria to Frontier; Vietnam, Argentina Unchanged
articles.summary: MSCI Inc. reclassified Bulgaria as a frontier market, while indicating no changes to Argentina’s and Vietnam’s status in its latest review of global stock indexes.

articles.title: MSCI Maintains Korea’s Emerging Market Status in Latest Review
articles.summary: MSCI Inc. kept South Korea in its emerging-market index and refrained from starting a formal review process that could eventually elevate the $5 trillion stock market to developed-market status.

articles.title: AI Boom Sees Investors Shift From Japan’s Value to Growth Stocks
articles.summary: Japanese equities, long regarded by global investors as a value market, are beginning to attract growth funds, as AI-linked firms power to the top of market-cap rankings, beating out the manufacturers and telecoms giants that dominated for decades.

articles.title: Morgan Stanley Caps Private Credit Fund After 11.6% Exit Request
articles.summary: A $7 billion private credit fund run by Morgan Stanley is capping investor withdrawals at 5%, allowing less than half of the redemptions shareholders requested in the second quarter.

articles.title: Congress passes the largest housing affordability bill in decades
articles.summary: An expansive bipartisan bill intended to bring down the cost of housing by boosting the supply of homes is headed for a final vote in the House, after having passed the Senate on Monday.
